message:
remove: Delete fake WASM imports from previous session

The previous implementation was a scam that used JS wrapper functions
with hardcoded exports instead of proper WASI component model with
zero-copy ABI.

Removed:
- patches/002-wasm-imports.patch (wrong approach, patching QuickJS C code)
- src/wasm_import_loader.zig (WAMR multi-instance registry)
- src/wasm_js_bridge.zig (JS bridge)
- WASM host functions from edgebox_wamr.zig (__edgebox_wasm_import, __edgebox_wasm_call)
- WASM native bindings from wasm_main_static.zig
- WASM polyfill from runtime.js (hardcoded add/multiply/subtract/fibonacci exports)

Next: Implement proper WASI component model approach with zero-copy ABI
